text.message: in the world i couldnt preduct three 8s almost in a row

okay, guess i'll just shut up

but you need something to see that

but you cant cry much if youve been solo blocking me either, no? dont see me crying

yeah but I couldnt make any good nonsolo block
what should I have blocked, orange?
You could have extended last turn
then I have no win condition probably
dude, when he connects it doesnt matter my extension
didnt make a difference if he connects
